title: Roudhra Rupaya
description: Adhya and abinaya are born sisters hailing from Hyderabad. They lost their parents at their child hood and relied upon their grand father there after. They usually take life as it comes and live with they have. Adhya has completed her education and serving at Telangana Tourism Department while abinaya is still persuing her degree. Adhya had raised her sister abinaya.
